prompt: Create a clean vertical promotional poster in a bright minimalist 3D isometric style on a warm off-white background. At the top, place a large bold rounded sans-serif headline reading Seedance 2.0 No More Waiting, split across two lines, with a smooth gradient from blue and violet on the left through magenta to orange on the right. Below the headline, show a stylized miniature scene of a long queue of exactly 96 tiny diverse people waiting in line, forming a wide U-shaped curve that starts near the lower center foreground, bends to the right, and continues diagonally far into the left background. The people should wear casual clothing in muted oranges, blues, tans, browns, whites, and grays, with toy-like proportions and shallow depth of field so distant figures become softly blurred. Along the queue are exactly 14 simple white cubic booth-like buildings with flat roofs, small rectangular windows, and open doors, receding in perspective from the lower right foreground to the upper left background; the closest booth on the right has a small group entering. Place exactly 1 purple-uniformed staff member near the middle-right doorway, gesturing toward the entrance as if directing the crowd. Use soft studio lighting, gentle shadows, a premium tech-advertising look, lots of white space, and a subtle tilt-shift miniature effect. At the bottom center, place the HailuoAI logo: a colorful circular spiral icon in pink, orange, purple, and blue followed by black modern wordmark text.
